title: read only does not protect empty tables
poc: create table my_table as select 1 with data;
alter table my_table set read only;
alter table my_table add column my_column integer;
key_bug_features: read only does not prevent schema changes
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE my_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
ALTER TABLE my_table SET READ ONLY;
ALTER TABLE my_table ADD COLUMN my_column INTEGER;
SELECT * FROM my_table WHERE my_column IS NULL;
